items.title_en: Oil prices wobble as breakdown in U.S.-Iran talks casts doubt over peace process
items.title_zh: 美伊谈判破裂引发对和平进程的怀疑，油价波动
items.desc_en: Oil prices were lower on Wednesday after Iran said it would not meet with U.S. delegates for talks in Qatar, amplifying concern about the peace process.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示不会与美国代表在卡塔尔举行会谈，加剧了人们对和平进程的担忧，周三油价走低。

items.title_en: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？
items.desc_en: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.
items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。

items.title_en: Europe’s defense boom faces a new test: Can it actually deliver weapons?
items.title_zh: 欧洲的国防繁荣面临新的考验：它真的能运送武器吗？
items.desc_en: Europe’s defense boom faces a test as investors weigh whether budgets and backlogs can become weapons, factories and returns.
items.desc_zh: 随着投资者权衡预算和积压是否可以成为武器、工厂和回报，欧洲的国防繁荣面临考验。

items.title_en: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary

items.desc_en: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.
items.desc_zh: 中国国家主席习近平周三发表讲话，纪念中国共产党成立105周年。

items.title_en: Sudan's RSF committed crimes against humanity in el-Fasher, Amnesty says

items.title_zh: 消防员努力控制致命的希腊野火
items.desc_en: Over 100 firefighters are working to extinguish a fire near Thessaloniki which has claimed a life.
items.desc_zh: 超过 100 名消防员正在努力扑灭塞萨洛尼基附近的一场大火，这场大火已造成人员伤亡。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持与生俱来的公民身份，对特朗普造成打击
items.desc_en: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决是唐纳德·特朗普移民议程的重大挫折，并受到民权组织的欢迎。

items.title_en: Roof collapse kills 14 schoolchildren in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦屋顶倒塌造成14名学童死亡
items.desc_en: Two people are taken into custody after the incident at a tuition centre in the Kahna suburb of Lahore.
items.desc_zh: 事件发生后，拉合尔卡纳郊区的一个补习中心有两人被拘留。

items.title_en: Rep. Tom Kean returns to Congress, says depression is why he went missing for months - NPR
items.title_zh: 众议员汤姆·基恩重返国会，称抑郁症是他失踪数月的原因 - NPR
items.desc_en: Rep. Tom Kean returns to Congress, says depression is why he went missing for months  NPRMissing US congressman explains mysterious four-month absence  BBCBack in Congress, Tom Kean Jr. Faces a New Ch
items.desc_zh: 众议员汤姆·基恩 (Tom Kean) 重返国会，称抑郁症是他失踪数月的原因 NPR 失踪的美国国会议员解释了神秘缺席四个月的原因 BBC 返回国会，小汤姆·基恩 (Tom Kean Jr.) 面临新的挑战

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds bans on transgender women in female school and college sports
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持禁止跨性别女性参加女子学校和大学体育运动的禁令
items.desc_en: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.
items.desc_zh: 它规定各州可以禁止变性运动员参加女子和女童运动。

items.title_en: Trump's massive defense budget, depleted war machine, spark U.S. state battle for business and jobs
items.title_zh: 特朗普庞大的国防预算、耗尽的战争机器引发了美国各州的商业和就业之争
items.desc_en: Trump's huge defense budget request and a race to replenish weapons stocks while building hypersonic missiles lead to war between U.S. states for jobs.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普巨额国防预算要求以及在制造高超音速导弹的同时补充武器库存的竞赛导致了美国各州之间的就业战争。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers
items.title_zh: 为什么《GTA 6》将在没有光盘的情况下启动 - 这对游戏玩家意味着什么
items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: The abundant but expensive energy source that's under your feet
items.title_zh: 你脚下丰富但昂贵的能源

items.desc_zh: 初创企业正在采取新的地热能方法，但经济有效吗？

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。

items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_zh: 科学家对微软的量子主张提出新的质疑
items.desc_en: The tech giant has consistently stood by its Majorana chip research despite scepticism from some experts in the field.
items.desc_zh: 尽管该领域的一些专家持怀疑态度，但这家科技巨头始终坚持其马约拉纳芯片研究。

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘
items.desc_en: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。
